text: Let's decorate our Christmas tree as pretty as a tree can be.
We'll decorate and we won't stop, until we put the star on top.
First come the lights all in a line, soon they'll make the whole tree shine; round and round the tree they go, from way up high to way down low.
Let's decorate our Christmas tree as pretty as a tree can be.
We'll decorate and we won't stop, until we put the star on top.
Next are the ornaments, big and small, let's find some spots to hang them all.
So many places they can go, from way up high to way down low.
Let's decorate our Christmas tree as pretty as a tree can be.
We'll decorate and we won't stop, until we put the star on top.
Next we'll hang some tinsel here and there, to make it sparkle everywhere.
All around the tree it goes, from way up high to way down low.
Let's decorate our Christmas tree as pretty as a tree can be.
We'll decorate and we won't stop, until we put the star on top.
Last comes the star so big and bright, to share with us its Christmas light.
There's only one place it should be, at the very top of our Christmas tree.
Let's decorate our Christmas tree as pretty as a tree can be.
We'll decorate and we won't stop, until we put the star on top.
